title: Weekend plans
subtitle: Use near future for real plans.
overview: Voy a + infinitive is perfect for weekend plans.
Add time and place to make plans complete.

items.es: Voy a visitar a un amigo.
items.en: I am going to visit a friend.
I am going to clean the house.
I am going to study Spanish.

items.es: Voy a comer en un restaurante.
items.en: I am going to eat in a restaurant.

lines.speaker: A
lines.es: ¿Qué vas a hacer este fin de semana?
lines.en: What are you going to do this weekend?

lines.speaker: B
lines.es: Voy a descansar y estudiar español.
lines.en: I am going to rest and study Spanish.

lines.speaker: B
lines.es: Sí, voy a comer con un amigo.
lines.en: Yes, I am going to eat with a friend.
